en: Why is everybody so serious? Acting so damn mysterious
ko: 왜 다들 그렇게 심각하고, 왜 그렇게 신비로운 척해?

en: Got shades on your eyes and your heels so high That you can't even have a good time
Everybody look to their left, yeah! Everybody look to their right
Can you feel that, yeah? We're paying with love tonight
Not about the money, money, money We don't need your money, money, money
We just wanna make the world dance Forget about the price tag
Ain't about the, uh, cha-ching, cha-ching Ain't about the, yeah, ba-bling, ba-bling
ko: 차칭, 차칭 소리가 중요한 게 아니야.

en: Wanna make the world dance Forget about the price tag
Huh, listen We need to take it back in time
Where music made us all unite, yeah And it wasn't low blows and videos
ko: 음악이 우리 모두를 하나로 만들었지, 그래.

en: I'm not the only one getting tired Why is everybody so obsessed?
